title: Shoroter Joba
overview: The film is revolves around a lonely woman named Joba’s mysterious life. Insatiable love, heartbreak after heartbreak, Joba’s life involving unexpected death raises several questions at various times. Is Joba really a killer? Or is there an invisible power with her?
